command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3S2TaCfAdzc6QNm.b8cc9e16633a --database GaKEFERPH576tbv5NzvkMD --execute 
INSERT IGNORE INTO organizations (name, slug, description, website, industry, size)
VALUES 
('WealthBridge AZ', 'wealthbridge-az', 'Arizona-based wealth management firm specializing in retirement planning and insurance solutions', 'https://wealthbridgeaz.com', 'Financial Services', 'small'),
('WealthBridge', 'wealthbridge', 'National wealth management and financial advisory platform', 'https://wealthbridge.com', 'Financial Services', 'medium');

INSERT IGNORE INTO user_organization_roles (userId, organizationId, globalRole, organizationRole)
SELECT 1, id, 'global_admin', 'org_admin' FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'wealthbridge-az'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE organizationRole = 'org_admin';

INSERT IGNORE INTO user_organization_roles (userId, organizationId, globalRole, organizationRole)
SELECT 1, id, 'global_admin', 'org_admin' FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'wealthbridge'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE organizationRole = 'org_admin';
